title: Countries airlift nationals evacuated from virus-hit cruise ship
text: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.

title: Army parachutes onto remote island to help Briton with suspected hantavirus
text: The specialist team parachuted onto Tristan da Cunha, a remote British overseas territory, to treat them.

title: Iran sends response to US proposals to end war
text: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

title: Putin says he thinks Ukraine conflict 'coming to an end'
text: The Russian leader sees potential for Ukraine negotiations, but condemns the West's backing for President Zelensky.

title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes killed 39
text: Israel and Hezbollah have continued to trade fire despite a ceasefire deal being announced last month.

title: Israel deports two activists detained on board Gaza flotilla
text: Spanish national Saif Abu Keshek and Brazilian Thiago Ávila were detained by Israel after sailing in a Gaza-bound aid flotilla.

title: Dress made from 500 loaves stuns African film awards
text: Celebrities, filmmakers and creators put up a performance at Africa's biggest night of film and fashion.

title: A chocolate laboratory in Italy will be good for chocolate eaters — and farmers
text: The chocolate biz is raising the bar with a lab to assess cacao beans from around the world. (Talk about a sweet gig!) Consumers and farmers stand to benefit from the "Standard of Excellence" program.

title: Keir Starmer's party lost big in U.K. local elections. Here's what comes next
text: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour party suffered major losses in local elections held across Britain last week. So far, Starmer has rejected calls for his resignation.

title: Temple Israel rebuilds after terror attack
text: Two months ago, a gunman drove through the preschool at Temple Israel, the largest synagogue in Michigan. Every child and teacher survived, but the community is still displaced and navigating the trauma of the attack.

title: Happy Mother's Day to the kindest mom. P.S. Your kindness annoyed me when I was a kid
text: She and her siblings had to make tea for and share food with every visitor. That did not make her happy. Today she has a different perspective. So she finally asked her mom: What made you so kind?

title: Of course we look for ourselves in art — but if we stop there, we're missing out
text: As I watched the new series, I only cared about Piggy — the thoughtful, smart kid stranded on an island with other boys. That made me think about what we look for in art.

title: How a pill approved 25 years ago transformed cancer treatment
text: When the Food and Drug Administration approved Gleevec to treat a form of leukemia in 2001, it ushered in a new era in cancer care.

title: Cape Verde: Tiny nation, massive World Cup dream
text: In Cape Verde, a small island nation off West Africa, World Cup qualification is transforming dreams on and off the pitch.

title: Iran may ‘give assurances on the use of nuclear facilities’
text: Iran may negotiate on nuclear facilities, but it 'won't destroy uranium or allow it to be moved'

title: Trump says US will not allow Iran to reach enriched uranium
text: US president says Washington has the nuclear material in Iran 'surveilled' and will 'blow up' anyone who gets near it.

title: Food inflation hammers households in war-hit Iran
text: Iranians faced with skyrocketing food prices as inflation soars, currency plunges amid US-enforced naval blockade.

title: LIVE: Barcelona vs Real Madrid – El Clasico La Liga
text: Follow the build-up, analysis and live text commentary of a crucial Clasico as Barcelona need a point to win La Liga.

title: Russia kills three Ukrainians in 24 hours, accuses Kyiv of violating truce
text: Russia claims Ukraine has committed more than 1,000 violations since the three-day truce came into effect on Saturday.

title: Putin hints at ending Russia’s war in Ukraine, but why now?
text: Amid a US-backed ceasefire, Putin signals peace talks could progress, but broader negotiations remain stalled.

title: With food benefit cuts looming in the US, Californians eye billionaire tax
text: US gov't cuts to food stamps will hit thousands of Californians. The state is set to vote on billionaire tax to make up.
